dialogos.texto_en: Wowww...
What a place this is...
(With the fancy lobby, pool and fitness center, \n and a convenient location with easy \n access to sightseeing spots%p-2;――%p;)
(This really is what they call a luxury resort hotel...\n I never imagined I'd actually have a chance to \n step inside one.)
H-hey, big bro, look at this! \nThis hotel has so many restaurants!
For real.\nBut isn't one place to eat at enough?
Huh?\nI think they're divided\ninto Japanese and Western cuisine.
O-oh... I see...
This hotel has a good reputation for desserts too,\nespecially the cake.
Also, the lounge on the top floor\nhas a great night view.\nWe should go check it out at night.
A view of the city from the hotel...!
That's so grown-up!\nWe'll have to tilt our cocktail glasses!
There are also places like that.\nOf course, we can't drink yet.
(Oh no, this is so different from the hotel I imagined.\n I have no idea how much one night costs...)
Uesugi-kun? You look pale, are you okay?
Well...\nI mean, is it really okay for us to stay here?
Of course it is. We have a reservation, so don't worry.
Wait, that's not what I meant.\nHow much does one night cost here?
U-um, Uesugi-kun?\nAren't you a bit close...?
Oh! Sorry!
What are you doing?
Beep beeeep!\nPlease refrain from sudden\nlovey-dovey moments in this kind of place.
We weren't doing anything!\nNothing at all!
You're breathing in sync.
Ahh, come on, stop teasing us!\nMore than that%p-2;――
Is it really okay for us to stay here?\nHow much does one night cost?
I wouldn't say it's cheap.
We're splurging a little more than usuaaal.
A little more...\nFrom my perspective,\nthis is an OUTRAGEOUS indulgence, isn't it?
It's okay to splurge once in a while.
That's right.\nThis is also a token of appreciation\nfrom Dad to you.
Huh?
I didn't ask him directly,\nbut it seems to be a way of thanking you\nfor completing your job as a tutor.
I-I see.
In other words,\nit's okay for you to boldly indulge yourself,\nUesugi-san!
(If that's the case...\n I shouldn't hold myself back and \n actually enjoy myself to the fullest.)
Sorry to keep you waiting.\nI've finished checking us in.
Right.\nWe have four rooms with twin beds,\nbut what kind of room arrangements should we go with?
They're all the same size?
Yes, the size and layout are the same everywhere,\nso it shouldn't be unfair\nno matter what combination we choose.
(So, we're getting rooms for two people.\n W-wait, does that mean\n Itsuki and I will be in the same room?!)
(No! No, no! That's definitely a no-go!\n No matter how long we've been dating, it's\n unthinkable for a man and a woman to share a room!!)
Um, Uesugi-kun?\nAbout the rooms%p-2;――
OWAAH?!
Huh? What's with that reaction?
Ahhh?\nPerhaps...
N-n-n-nothing!\nI-I'll room with Raiha!
Yeah, that makes sense.\nThere's really no other option, right?
Oh, oh?\nYou too, Itsuki...
Wh-what is it?
Itsuki-chan,\ndo you want to be in the same room as Futaro-kun?
Huhhh?!
What the%p-2;――
I-I'm alright!\nI'll room with you, Ichika!
Okaaay!\nLooking forward to it then.
What about the rest of us?\nSomeone will have to be in a single room.
Well, I can take the single room.
Ah! In that case,\nI'd like to be in the same room as Yotsuba-san\ninstead of big bro.
Is that okay, Raiha-chan?\nAlrighty, let's room together then!
What... Raiha...\nYou don't want to room with me...?
Heh...\nEven little Raiha is growing up,\nisn't she?
Ermm, what are you looking at?
No, it's not like that.\nAnyway, you'd like to be in a single room, right, big bro?
Huh? Why's that?
Well, I mean...\nIsn't that right, Itsuki-san?!
Y-yes.\nIt's only natural for a man\nto want privacy in his own room, isn't it?
That's not exactly what I meant, though...
Raiha-chan is the more mature one.
...Or rather, Fu-kun and Itsuki are like children.
I don't really get it,\nbut I don't mind having a single room.\nRaiha is all yours, Yotsuba.
Alright! Leave her to me!
Okay, I'll be with Miku, then.
Okay.
Right, room arrangements are settled then.\nNow, let's%p-2;――
Yeah, head to our rooms%p-2;――
Go to the restaurant for dinner!
No, we'll go to our rooms first, right?\nWhat about our luggage?
Don't worry.\nThe bellhop will take care of it for us.
(So that's how it works...\n I honestly can't believe how amazing \n these luxury hotels are...)
Now that you mention it, I'm pretty hungry.
Okay then, let's gooo!
Right-o!
